query: SELECT a.id, a.applicationNumber, a.status, r.totalScore, r.riskLevel FROM applications a JOIN risk_questionnaires r ON a.id = r.applicationId WHERE r.totalScore IS NOT NULL AND a.status IN ('submitted', 'approved', 'returned', 'reviewing') ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2uixhWXF4JwUSvL.6b97ca2f8816 --database gu8TL5Ga5RUHfjV8rgaSaT --execute SELECT a.id, a.applicationNumber, a.status, r.totalScore, r.riskLevel FROM applications a JOIN risk_questionnaires r ON a.id = r.applicationId WHERE r.totalScore IS NOT NULL AND a.status IN ('submitted', 'approved', 'returned', 'reviewing') ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT 5;
